title: Lasso Peptides—A New Weapon Against Superbugs
summary: Comprehensive review of lasso peptide structure, biosynthesis, and antimicrobial properties

class_distribution.class_ii: Most common, no multiple disulfide bridges

exceptions.longest: Pandonodin (33 AA), Astexin-1 (23 AA), Astexin-3 (24 AA)

key_structural_constraints: Ring too small (<7 AA): Steric constraints prevent tail encapsulation
Ring too large (>9 AA): Insufficient tightness to permanently encapsulate tail

archetypal.name: Microcin J25 (MccJ25)
archetypal.significance: First discovered and described lasso peptide

historical.name: Anantin
historical.note: Identified earlier but initially described as cyclic peptide, later reclassified as lasso peptide

biosynthetic_characteristics.formation_outcome: Complex biosynthetic pathway leading to ring closure and lasso structure

comparative_analysis.vs_typical_peptides: Lasso peptides structurally different due to macrolactam ring
comparative_analysis.advantage_of_biosynthesis: Naturally produced lasso peptides overcome synthetic challenges

who_priority_pathogens: Gram-negative bacteria resistant to last-resort antibiotics

clinical_context.crisis_statistics: Superbugs projected to cause 39 million deaths by 2050
clinical_context.existing_antibiotic_limitations: Current antibiotics rendered ineffective by resistance
clinical_context.lasso_peptide_potential: Last chance weapon against emerging superbugs
clinical_context.new_therapeutic_target: Bind to atypical sides of ribosomes

research_trends.prediction_capability: Thousands of sequences predicted by bioinformatics
research_trends.novelty_iceberg: Known lasso peptides represent tip of iceberg in bacterial genomes
research_trends.classification_expansion: Recent discoveries led to proposal of new class V

conclusion_and_future_directions.current_status: Lasso peptides emerge as promising antibacterial agents
conclusion_and_future_directions.mechanism_advantage: Novel molecular targets avoid common resistance mechanisms
conclusion_and_future_directions.therapeutic_timeline: Potential "last chance" weapon in immediate future
conclusion_and_future_directions.research_priority: Characterization and development of lasso peptides critical for antimicrobial discovery
